commit.message:
MENU-DYNAMIC-RESOLVE: per-frame menu re-resolve + live PredicateContext; retire bespoke greying

Second carve of the dynamic-menu-enablement design (D1 = MENU-ENABLED-SUBSTRATE
#313 landed the editor-ui substrate). Wires the host + shell to the canonical
registry enablement path and RETIRES the bespoke MenuStateHandoff /
MenuStateSnapshot / play_item_enabled greying channel — one enablement path now,
and the File "looks clickable but no-ops during Play" rough edge is fixed.

editor-egui-host:
- handoff.rs: `MenuStateHandoff = Handoff<MenuStateSnapshot>` ->
  `PredicateContextHandoff = Handoff<PredicateContext>`.
- menu.rs: `build_main_menu_entries()` -> `project_main_menu(&MenuRegistry,
  &PredicateContext)` returning `(label, accel, command, enabled)` 4-tuples;
  DELETE `play_item_enabled`.
- lib.rs: cache the `MenuRegistry` (built once); `render` RE-RESOLVES it each
  frame against the live `PredicateContext` (acquired from the handoff) and greys
  each item via the resolved `enabled` -> `add_enabled`; the 4 cached entry-vec
  fields + the `menu_state` acquire are gone.

editor-shell:
- lifecycle/mod.rs: `menu_state_snapshot()` -> `predicate_context()` (fills
  play_state / can_* / is_editing / has_selection from the live PlayState +
  selection); the keyboard `window_event` path now resolves against the live
  context via `enabled_command_for_shortcut`, so a disabled accelerator (Ctrl+S
  while greyed) does not fire.
- render_path.rs: the per-frame publish + the init clone-in switch to the
  predicate-context handoff.

editor-state:
- DELETE menu_state_snapshot.rs (the bespoke MenuStateSnapshot); keep the generic
  Handoff<T>. (The new handoff alias lives in editor-egui-host, parameterized by
  editor-ui's PredicateContext — no editor-state -> editor-ui edge.)

Tests: editor-shell `menu_state_snapshot_tracks_play_state` ->
`predicate_context_tracks_play_state`; host `play_item_enabled_*` test retired ->
`enablement_tracks_context` (asserts the resolved `enabled` per editing/playing
context; disabled File items stay PRESENT, not hidden); the label/command/order
+ accelerator-display tests migrate onto `project_main_menu` via a 3-tuple
`menu_entries()` helper (unchanged assertions).

Behaviour: File Save/Open/Save-As + the Play items now grey out per the live
state via the ONE registry path; `command_for_shortcut` + the W08 parity guard
are unchanged; menu CLICKS still flow through the MenuCommandHandoff FIFO (only
the keyboard's enablement was unified, not the click transport).

10 files (9 M + menu_state_snapshot.rs deleted), -79 net. No Cargo/edge change.
Gate: VERIFY OK 7/7 + 10/10 arch lints; editor-state/host/shell tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.8 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
